{{Quote|…Nasty weapon.|[[Boss (clone commando)/Legends|Boss]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic Commando">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''</ref>}}
The '''LS-150 Heavy Accelerated Charged Particle Repeater Gun''' ('''Heavy ACP Repeater''') was a large air-cooled repeater with disintegrating plasma cartridges.

==Description==
Mostly seen in the hands of [[Trandoshan Elites]], the LS-150 was a bit more portable than a turret off a starship. [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] manufactured this gun (along with other guns such as the [[Accelerated Charged Particle Repeater Gun]], the Heavy Repeater's little brother.) The LS-150 used a 200-round magazine and chewed through rounds quickly, and these ammo packs were large and bulky, allowing a typical Human to only carry one in reserve.

While ACP weapons generally lacked effectiveness against armored droids, the LS-150's brute firepower and high cycling rate granted its effectiveness against heavy units such as a [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|Super Battle Droid]] or mass amounts of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s. It also tore through living targets such as Humans and [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]] mercilessly killing or injuring them very quickly.

For close combat, it had a bayonet to stab enemies in front of one as seen when a heavy mercenary made a clone trooper a victim of its brute power aboard the ''[[Prosecutor]]''.

It had a fairly good range but was rather heavy and large for a weapon, compensating for its raw power in both melee action and shooting, which explains why only well-trained users like the Trandoshan heavy mercenary often used this kind of weapon. In fact, it was so heavy that a human carrying it usually had balancing issues, making it difficult for him to run.

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the weapons were used by [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] mercenaries and slavers.
